title: SoftBank is creating a robotics company that builds data centers — and already eyeing a $100B IPO
description: You need infrastructure to build AI a and robots, but apparently you also need AI and robots to build infrastructure.
descriptionDE: Man braucht Infrastruktur, um KI und Roboter aufzubauen, aber offenbar braucht man auch KI und Roboter, um Infrastruktur aufzubauen.
titleDE: SoftBank gründet ein Robotikunternehmen, das Rechenzentren baut – und plant bereits einen Börsengang im Wert von 100 Milliarden US-Dollar

title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
description: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.
descriptionDE: Der E-Commerce-Riese verdient mit AWS mehr Geld als erwartet, gibt aber auch viel aus und wird dies auch in naher Zukunft tun, sagte sein Vorstandsvorsitzender.
titleDE: Das Cloud-Geschäft von Amazon boomt – und damit auch seine Investitionsausgaben

title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
description: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.
descriptionDE: Der Hersteller von Claude hat laut mit der Angelegenheit vertrauten Quellen mehrere Vorkaufsangebote mit Bewertungen im Bereich von 850 bis 900 Milliarden US-Dollar erhalten.
titleDE: Quellen: Anthropic könnte eine neue 50-Milliarden-Dollar-Runde mit einer Bewertung von 900 Milliarden Dollar aufbringen

title: Elon Musk’s worst enemy in court is Elon Musk
description:
Just a simple country CEO who was being tricked by that sophisticated lawyer | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

About five hours into Elon Musk's testimony, I typed the following sentence into my notes: "I have never been more sympathetic to Sam Altman in my life."
Musk's direct testimony was an improvement over yesterday - even if his lawyer kept asking leading questions to cue him in how to answer. But that memory was immediately obliterated by an absolutely miserable cross-examination. For hours, Musk refused to answer yes or no questions with yes or no, occasionally "forgot" things he'd testified to in the morning, and scolded defense lawyer William Savitt. I watched a few jury members glance at each other. During one testy exchange, one woman wa …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Nur ein einfacher Landeschef, der von diesem raffinierten Anwalt ausgetrickst wurde | Bild: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images Ungefähr fünf Stunden nach Elon Musks Aussage tippte ich den folgenden Satz in meine Notizen: „Ich habe Sam Altman in meinem Leben noch nie so sympathisch gegenübergestanden.“ Musks direkte Aussage...
titleDE: Elon Musks schlimmster Feind vor Gericht ist Elon Musk

title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
description: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.
descriptionDE: Elon Musk vertrat am zweiten Tag Stellung für seinen Versuch, OpenAI legal zu demontieren.
titleDE: Im Zeugenstand kann sich Elon Musk seinen eigenen Tweets nicht entziehen

title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR

titleDE: Meta verbrennt immer noch Geld für AR/VR

title: Satya Nadella says he’s ready to ‘exploit’ the new OpenAI deal
description: Microsoft gets to offer OpenAI's tech to its cloud customers and doesn't have to pay for it. "We fully plan to exploit it," Nadella said.
descriptionDE: Microsoft kann seinen Cloud-Kunden die Technologie von OpenAI anbieten und muss nicht dafür bezahlen. „Wir planen voll und ganz, es auszunutzen“, sagte Nadella.
titleDE: Satya Nadella sagt, er sei bereit, den neuen OpenAI-Deal „auszunutzen“.

title: Microsoft says it has over 20M paid Copilot users, and they really are using it
description: Despite the lingering perception that no one really uses Copilot, Microsoft said on Wednesday that the number of users and engagement is growing.
descriptionDE: Trotz der anhaltenden Wahrnehmung, dass niemand Copilot wirklich nutzt, sagte Microsoft am Mittwoch, dass die Anzahl der Benutzer und das Engagement wachsen.
titleDE: Microsoft gibt an, über 20 Millionen zahlende Copilot-Benutzer zu haben, und sie nutzen es tatsächlich

title: Google Cloud surpasses $20B, but says growth was capacity-constrained
description: Google Cloud topped $20B in quarterly revenue for the first time, fueled by surging demand for AI. But capacity constraints mean it could have grown even faster.
descriptionDE: Google Cloud erzielte zum ersten Mal einen Quartalsumsatz von über 20 Milliarden US-Dollar, angetrieben durch die steigende Nachfrage nach KI. Aufgrund von Kapazitätsengpässen hätte das Unternehmen jedoch noch schneller wachsen können.
titleDE: Google Cloud übersteigt die 20-Milliarden-Dollar-Marke, sagt jedoch, dass das Wachstum kapazitätsbeschränkt war

title: Google gains 25M subscriptions in Q1, driven by YouTube and Google One
description: Google added 25M paid subscriptions in Q1, reaching 350M total, as YouTube and Google One grow.
descriptionDE: Google hat im ersten Quartal 25 Millionen kostenpflichtige Abonnements hinzugefügt und erreicht damit insgesamt 350 Millionen, während YouTube und Google One wachsen.
titleDE: Google gewinnt im ersten Quartal 25 Millionen Abonnements, angetrieben von YouTube und Google One

title: Google Search queries hit an ‘all time high’ last quarter
description:
Google Search queries hit an "all time high" in the first quarter of 2026, according to a statement from CEO Sundar Pichai published as part of Alphabet's earnings on Wednesday.
"Our AI investments and full stack approach are lighting up every part of the business," Pichai says. "Search had a strong quarter with AI experiences driving usage, queries at an all time high, and 19% revenue growth." He also notes that Q1 was "our strongest quarter ever for our consumer AI plans, driven by the Gemini App" and that the company now has more than 350 million paid subscriptions, with "YouTube and Google One being the key drivers."
Alphabet also anno …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Laut einer Erklärung von CEO Sundar Pichai, die am Mittwoch im Rahmen der Gewinnmitteilung von Alphabet veröffentlicht wurde, erreichten die Google-Suchanfragen im ersten Quartal 2026 ein „Allzeithoch“. „Unsere KI-Investitionen und unser Full-Stack-Ansatz bringen Licht in jeden Bereich des Geschäfts“, sagt Pichai. „Die Suche hatte eine starke...
titleDE: Die Google-Suchanfragen erreichten im letzten Quartal ein „Allzeithoch“.

title: Where the goblins came from
description: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
descriptionDE: Wie sich Goblin-Ausgaben in KI-Modellen verbreiten: Zeitleiste, Grundursache und Lösungen für persönlichkeitsbedingte Macken im GPT-5-Verhalten.
titleDE: Woher die Kobolde kamen

title: Is AI video just a prequel? Runway’s CEO thinks world models are next
description: AI-generated video has gone from novelty to creative tool almost overnight, and Runway has a front row seat to the shift. The New York-based company has raised close to $860 million at a $5.3 billion valuation, and its models are going toe-to-toe with the most well-funded labs in the world, including Google and OpenAI.   The technology goes way beyond […]
descriptionDE: KI-generierte Videos haben sich fast über Nacht von einer Neuheit zu einem kreativen Werkzeug entwickelt, und Runway sitzt dabei in der ersten Reihe. Das in New York ansässige Unternehmen hat fast 860 Millionen US-Dollar bei einer Bewertung von 5,3 Milliarden US-Dollar eingesammelt und seine Modelle stehen auf Augenhöhe mit den finanzkräftigsten Laboren der Welt, darunter ...
titleDE: Ist KI-Video nur ein Prequel? Der CEO von Runway glaubt, dass Weltmodels als nächstes an der Reihe sind

title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
description: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.
descriptionDE: Das vom ehemaligen Twitter-CEO Parag Agrawal gegründete KI-Agent-Tool-Startup hat unter der Führung von Sequoia 100 Millionen US-Dollar gesammelt, Monate nachdem es zuvor 100 Millionen US-Dollar gesammelt hatte.
titleDE: Fünf Monate nach der letzten großen Erhöhung erreicht Parallel Web Systems eine Bewertung von 2 Milliarden US-Dollar

title: All the evidence unveiled so far in Musk v. Altman
description:
The Musk v. Altman trial is underway, and that means exhibits, or the evidence to be presented in court, are being revealed piece by piece. So far, email exchanges, photos, and corporate documents are circulating from the earliest days of OpenAI - and from before the AI lab even had a name. Some high-level takeaways: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang gave OpenAI an in-demand supercomputer, Musk largely drafted OpenAI's mission and heavily influenced its early structure, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman appeared to want to lean heavily on Y Combinator for early support for OpenAI, OpenAI president Greg Brockman and Ilya Sutskever worried about Musk's level of con …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Der Prozess Musk gegen Altman ist im Gange, und das bedeutet, dass Beweisstücke oder Beweise, die vor Gericht vorgelegt werden sollen, Stück für Stück enthüllt werden. Bisher kursieren E-Mail-Austausch, Fotos und Unternehmensdokumente aus den Anfängen von OpenAI – und aus der Zeit, bevor das KI-Labor überhaupt einen Namen hatte. Einige hoch...
titleDE: Alle bisher im Fall Musk gegen Altman enthüllten Beweise

title: Ubuntu’s AI plans have Linux users looking for a ‘kill switch’
description:
Canonical's plan to add AI features to Ubuntu has some users asking for "a version of Ubuntu that does not include these features," while others say they'll stick with older versions of the Linux distro or even switch to a different one. After Canonical's announcement earlier this week that it's bringing AI features to Ubuntu, replies included requests for an AI "kill switch" or a way to disable the upcoming features, and comparisons to Microsoft's addition of AI features into Windows 11. Canonical's VP of engineering, Jon Seager, responded on Tuesday, stating that Canonical isn't planning to add a "global AI kill switch," but users will be  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Der Plan von Canonical, Ubuntu um KI-Funktionen zu erweitern, lässt einige Benutzer nach einer „Version von Ubuntu fragen, die diese Funktionen nicht enthält“, während andere sagen, dass sie bei älteren Versionen der Linux-Distribution bleiben oder sogar zu einer anderen wechseln werden. Nach der Ankündigung von Canonical Anfang dieser Woche, dass es bri...
titleDE: Bei den KI-Plänen von Ubuntu suchen Linux-Benutzer nach einem „Kill-Switch“.

title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
description: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.
descriptionDE: Laut Google wird die neue Funktion KI-Technologie nutzen, um automatisch eine Kopie Ihrer Garderobe zu erstellen, die auf den Kleidungsstücken basiert, die in Ihrer Google Fotos-Bibliothek erscheinen.
titleDE: Google Fotos nutzt KI, um die ikonische Garderobe aus „Clueless“ Wirklichkeit werden zu lassen

titleDE: Weitere Gemini-Funktionen kommen auf Google TV

title: Google Photos launches an AI try-on feature for clothes you already have
description:
Google Photos is launching a new AI-powered feature you can use to virtually try on clothes you already have. Using the photos in your gallery, Google will create a virtual "wardrobe," allowing you to mix and match outfits, save the looks you like, and share them with friends.
A video shared by Google shows how Photos organizes your outfits and individual pieces of clothing into a virtual "wardrobe." You can browse through the outfits you were captured wearing, as well as create new ones by choosing from tops, bottoms, skirts, dresses, and shoes to put together a new look.

You can also select the button in the bottom right corner of each o …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Google Fotos führt eine neue KI-gestützte Funktion ein, mit der Sie bereits vorhandene Kleidungsstücke virtuell anprobieren können. Mithilfe der Fotos in Ihrer Galerie erstellt Google eine virtuelle „Garderobe“, in der Sie Outfits kombinieren, die gewünschten Looks speichern und mit Freunden teilen können. Ein von Goog geteiltes Video...
titleDE: Google Fotos führt eine KI-Anprobefunktion für Kleidung ein, die Sie bereits haben

title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
description:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. 
The trial began with jury selection on April 27th, before Elon Musk took the stand on Tuesday as the first witness called, portraying his interest in founding OpenAI as an effort to help save humanity, before returning to the stand on Wednesday.
Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and cofounder Greg Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI says that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk is asking for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation. Musk has also demanded that OpenAI’s nonprofit receive up to $150 billion in damages he’s asking for if he wins the case.
Here’s all the latest on the trial between Musk and Altman:
Elon Musk’s worst enemy in court is Elon Musk
			
Freedom!
			
Unfortunately we will not be talking about safety details of any specific product.
			
The jury is leaving for the day. “I suspect it’s a nice day out there,” YGR says.
			
Mechahitler might be a bad look for the AI safety defender.
			
Musk’s broader AI safety commitment (or lack thereof) comes up.
			
This is so testy.
			
Did Musk even read the OpenAI term sheet?
			
Musk asked Shivon Zilis to stay ‘close and friendly’ with OpenAI to keep info flowing.
			
Musk says xAI probably won’t be the first to get to AGI.
			
We’re back from a break, talking about SpaceX and xAI.
			
Don’t worry about Tesla’s robot army!
			
“You mostly do unfair questions.”
			
“It’s a free country.”
			
“Will you answer my question?”
			
Musk’s desire for control comes up again.
			
“This is a hypothetical.”
			
All the evidence unveiled so far in Musk v. Altman
			
Did Musk initially envision OpenAI as a corporation?
			
Musk is being combative on cross already
			
“I did say that I would commit up to a billion dollars, yes.”
			
Is Tesla really not working on AGI?
			
Musk is returning to the stand.
			
At times, being a judge is much like being a kindergarden teacher.
			
We’re on a break.
			
“I mean, all due respect to Microsoft, do you really want Microsoft controlling digital superintelligence?”
			
“What’s going on here this is a bait and switch.”
			
A Musk-Altman spat about Microsoft.
			
Musk really cannot help himself.
			
“Capped profit” wasn’t an issue, even when Microsoft got involved.
			
“Tesla is not pursuing AGI.”
			
Musk is more on his game today.
			
“After I received these reassurances that OpenAI would continue to be a non-profit I continued to donate over $10 million.”
			
“I actually was a fool who provided free funding for them to create a startup.”
			
More discussion of who would own OpenAI.
			
“I don’t lose my temper,” says Elon Musk.
			
“2017 was a hard year, and we’ve made mistakes.”
			
“I formed many for-profit tech companies, and could have done so with OAI.”
			
“Crystal clear focus.”
			
Sam Altman has just entered the room, right ahead of the jury.
			
A member of the public just got dressed down by YGR about taking photos.
			
Musk v Altman et al. is back in session.
			
In naming OpenAI, Elon Musk worried anything related to the Turing Test could mean bad PR.
			
Elon Musk appeared more petty than prepared
			
That’s a wrap!
			
YGR scolds OpenAI for taking inconsistent positions on the origin of its name.
			
Elon Musk tells the jury that all he wants to do is save humanity
			
Arguments over ownership.
			
Apparently OpenAI could have had an ICO.
			
“I was not averse to a small for-profit,” Musk says.
			
We’re reading emails between Musk and Jensen Huang.
			
Musk says nonprofit was non-negotiable for OpenAI.
			
We’re at the founding of OpenAI.
			
Musk says he would have created something like OpenAI on his own.
			
Musk recalls meeting Sam Altman.
			
Sam Altman left during a break, but Elon Musk’s lawyer didn’t notice.
			
“Here we are in 2026 and AI is scary smart.”
			
“I have extreme concerns about AI,” says Musk.
			
AI will be as smart as ‘any human as soon as next year.’
			
Musk claims he has time for SpaceX, Tesla, Neuralink, and the Boring Company because he works a lot.
			
Musk is telling the jury he (co)founded Tesla.
			
Neuralink’s long-term goal is… AI?
			
“There need to be things that people are excited about that make life worth living … being out there among the stars can excite everyone.”
			
A little Musk biography.
			
Elon Musk, looking funereal in a black suit with a black tie, says “it’s not okay to steal a charity.”
			
Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI
			
We are back from a break.
			
Elon Musk will be the first witness in Musk v. Altman.
			
“Microsoft unlocked with OpenAI a virtuous cycle.”
			
Microsoft enters the chat.
			
“We are here because Mr Musk didn’t get his way at OpenAI.”
			
“[Musk] demanded control, he demanded the ability to make all the decisions without regard to the other founders.”
			
OpenAI lawyers argue that Elon was right in the middle of discussions about a for-profit pivot.
			
“Musk was furious that OpenAI succeeded.”
			
OpenAI: Musk’s lawsuit is a “pageant of hypocrisy.”
			
Sam Altman’s “related party conflicted transactions” are how he made money on OpenAI, Molo says.
			
Technical difficulties.
			
OpenAI is like a museum store that has looted the Picassos and pocketed the profits.
			
AGI might be out of fashion in the AI world, but it will be at the center of this trial
			
“The defendants in this case stole a charity.”
			
Musk and Altman go to court
			
Good morning from the Musk v Altman line outside the courtroom.
			
Jury selection in Musk v. Altman: ‘People don’t like him’
			
We have a jury.
			
Elon Musk’s lawyer tried to get some jurors thrown out for disliking Musk.
			
Apparently things are exciting outside.
			
We have gone through the first 20 potential jurors.
			
Voir dire has begun.
			
The Elon Musk vs. OpenAI trial starts today.
			
Elon Musk drops fraud claims against OpenAI and Sam Altman before trial.
			
Musk vs. Altman is here, and it’s going to get messy
			
Elon Musk is about to be a very busy boy!
			
‘Sideshow’ concerns and billionaire dreams: What I learned from Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI
			
Elon Musk’s xAI is suing OpenAI and Apple
			
Inside Elon Musk’s messy breakup with OpenAI
			
Elon Musk is suing OpenAI and Sam Altman again
descriptionDE: Sam Altman und Elon Musk stehen sich in einem hochriskanten Prozess gegenüber, der die Zukunft von OpenAI und seinem bekanntesten Produkt, ChatGPT, verändern könnte. Im Jahr 2024 reichte Musk eine Klage ein, in der er OpenAI beschuldigte, seine Gründungsmission, KI zum Nutzen der Menschheit zu entwickeln, aufgegeben und den Fokus auf die Steigerung der Gewinne verlagert zu haben ...
titleDE: Live-Updates vom Gerichtsstreit zwischen Elon Musk und Sam Altman über die Zukunft von OpenAI

title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
description: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
descriptionDE: OpenAI skaliert Stargate, um die Recheninfrastruktur für AGI aufzubauen und fügt neue Rechenzentrumskapazitäten hinzu, um der wachsenden KI-Nachfrage gerecht zu werden.
titleDE: Aufbau der Recheninfrastruktur für das Intelligenzzeitalter

title: Tumbler Ridge families are suing OpenAI
description:
Seven families of victims injured or killed in the Tumbler Ridge school shooting in Canada have filed lawsuits against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, accusing the company and its leadership of negligence after they failed to alert police to the suspected shooter's ChatGPT activity. The families allege OpenAI stayed silent after its systems flagged activity by shooting suspect Jesse Van Rootselaar in order to protect the company's reputation and upcoming initial public offering (IPO).
The Wall Street Journal reports that OpenAI "considered" flagging the 18-year-old's activity to police, which reportedly involved conversations about gun violence, …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Sieben Familien von Opfern, die bei der Schießerei in einer Schule in Tumbler Ridge in Kanada verletzt oder getötet wurden, haben Klagen gegen OpenAI und CEO Sam Altman eingereicht und dem Unternehmen und seiner Führung Fahrlässigkeit vorgeworfen, nachdem sie die Polizei nicht auf die ChatGPT-Aktivitäten des mutmaßlichen Schützen aufmerksam gemacht hatten. Die Familien behaupten, O...
titleDE: Tumbler Ridge-Familien verklagen OpenAI

title: ChatGPT downloads are slowing — and may cause problems for OpenAI’s IPO
description:
ChatGPT is struggling to keep up its once-explosive growth as users uninstall the app or opt for rival chatbots instead. According to data from market intelligence firm Sensor Tower, ChatGPT experienced a 132 percent increase in uninstalls year over year in April. Its uninstall rate was even higher last month, up 413 percent year-over-year, following OpenAI's deal with the Pentagon in February. 
While ChatGPT is still growing its user base, Sensor Tower says that growth is slowing down - ChatGPT increased its monthly active users by 168 percent in January, but only 78 percent in April. ChatGPT still has a "substantially larger user base" th …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: ChatGPT hat Mühe, sein einst explosives Wachstum aufrechtzuerhalten, da Benutzer die App deinstallieren oder sich stattdessen für konkurrierende Chatbots entscheiden. Laut Daten des Marktforschungsunternehmens Sensor Tower verzeichnete ChatGPT im April einen Anstieg der Deinstallationen um 132 Prozent gegenüber dem Vorjahr. Die Deinstallationsrate war sogar noch höher ...
titleDE: ChatGPT-Downloads verlangsamen sich – und können Probleme beim Börsengang von OpenAI verursachen

title: Larry’s risky business
description:
Oracular spectacular? | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge	

If you want to know whether the AI bubble is bursting, there's only one publicly traded company that will tell you: Oracle.
That's right, the database company. Oracle has burned its boats and pivoted to AI, but not in any kind of usual way. It is not a foundation model builder like OpenAI or Anthropic, obviously. It's not quite a neocloud, though it has entered the same bare-metal business as CoreWeave. It is a software-as-a-service company that has made an audacious bet on a very specific future version of AI as Oracle's traditional business has gracefully declined. It is significantly older than any of its AI competitors, save Microsoft,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Orakelhaftes Spektakel? | Bild: Cath Virginia / The Verge Wenn Sie wissen möchten, ob die KI-Blase platzt, gibt es nur ein börsennotiertes Unternehmen, das Ihnen das sagen kann: Oracle. Genau, das Datenbankunternehmen. Oracle hat seine Boote niedergebrannt und ist auf KI umgestiegen, aber nicht auf die übliche Art und Weise. Es...
titleDE: Larrys riskantes Geschäft

title: Firestorm Labs raises $82M to take drone factories into the field
description: A defense startup just raised $82 million to put drone factories inside shipping containers and bring manufacturing to the front lines.

titleDE: Firestorm Labs sammelt 82 Millionen US-Dollar, um Drohnenfabriken auf den Markt zu bringen

title: Taylor Swift deepfakes are pushing scams on TikTok
description:
Scammers are using AI-generated videos of celebrities including Taylor Swift and Rihanna to promote shady services on TikTok, according to authentication company Copyleaks. 
The ads typically show celebrities in interview settings, such as red carpets, podcasts, or talk shows, and often manipulate real footage with AI, the company said. Many promote rewards programs claiming users can earn money by watching TikTok content and giving feedback. TikTok's official branding appears in some of the ads, though users are redirected to third-party services that ask for personal information.
In one ad, a realistic AI avatar of Swift urges users to s …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Nach Angaben des Authentifizierungsunternehmens Copyleaks nutzen Betrüger KI-generierte Videos von Prominenten wie Taylor Swift und Rihanna, um zwielichtige Dienste auf TikTok zu bewerben. Die Anzeigen zeigen typischerweise Prominente in Interviewsituationen, etwa auf roten Teppichen, Podcasts oder Talkshows, und manipulieren oft ...
titleDE: Taylor Swift Deepfakes treiben Betrügereien auf TikTok voran

title: It’s time to make a plan for nuclear waste
description: Today, nuclear energy enjoys a rare moment of support across the political spectrum in the US. Interest from tech companies that are scrambling to meet demand for massive data centers has sparked a resurgence of money and attention in the industry. That newfound interest is exactly why it’s time to talk about an old problem:…
descriptionDE: Heute genießt die Kernenergie einen seltenen Moment der Unterstützung im gesamten politischen Spektrum der USA. Das Interesse von Technologieunternehmen, die sich bemühen, die Nachfrage nach riesigen Rechenzentren zu befriedigen, hat zu einem Wiederaufleben von Geld und Aufmerksamkeit in der Branche geführt. Dieses neu entdeckte Interesse ist genau der Grund, warum es an der Zeit ist ...

title: Health-care AI is here. We don’t know if it actually helps patients.

AI-based tools are trawling through patient records, flagging people who may require certain support or treatments. They are also used to interpret medical exam results and x-rays. A…

KI-basierte Tools durchsuchen Patientenakten und kennzeichnen Personen, die möglicherweise bestimmte Unterstützung oder Behandlungen benötigen. Sie werden auch zur Interpretation verwendet...
